active_work.text: Mission control now validates and serves the complete SC201-SC400 structured-RE conversion ledger. All 200 conversion rows are banked as infrastructure, contract, design, synchronization, or closeout rows. SR001-SR100 remains 91 banked and 9 blocked; SR101-SR200 remains 10 banked, 23 blocked, and 67 queued. No bridge row, q4 REML row, AI-REML wording, public optimizer control, interval coverage claim, commit, PR, or Ayumi reply is promoted by this widget work.
